== Notes for [[Item:Q102552|Q102552]] ==

MeRomi=from Rome.

According to some sources, Rav Hai had no children, which would mean that this person either did not exist or was not a son of Rav Hai. Please see more information at Rav Hai's profile.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000165200311827

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
